package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerMetricLabelCardinalityBuild() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_metric_label_cardinality_build"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Lazy loading. Flag eager construction of high-cardinality metric labels before the metric is emitted."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
